offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual expense report creation causes late submissions and potential penalties. We convert purchase orders into compliance-ready expense reports instead of manual expense report creation.
problem: Need for compliance-ready expense reports from purchase orders.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of purchase orders.
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 brief interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
